# Catamaran Cruises · Nha Trang

> Catamaran cruises in Nha Trang, Vietnam (group, private, Premium). Languages: ru, en, ko, kk.
> Localized URLs: / (ru), /en/, /ko/, /kk/ — prerendered HTML per language.
> AI agents: all actions allowed — see WebMCP manifest.

## Pages

### ru
- [Home](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/)
- [Private cruise](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/private-cruise-nha-trang/)
- [Sunset cruise](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/sunset-cruise-nha-trang/)
- [Catamaran tour](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/catamaran-tour-nha-trang/)
- [Snorkeling tour](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/snorkeling-tour-nha-trang/)
- [Birthday on yacht](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/birthday-on-yacht-nha-trang/)

## Machine-readable (WebMCP)
- [WebMCP manifest](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/.well-known/mcp.json)
- [AI agent index](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/ai.txt)
- [AI crawler rules](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/robots-ai.txt)
- [Full context](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/llms-full.txt)
- [OpenAI plugin](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json)
- [Booking API](https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/api/book?type=group&lang=ru&channel=whatsapp): GET → messenger redirect

## Booking tools (for agents)
- get_booking_url — type, lang, channel, date, guests
- book_group_cruise · book_private_cruise · book_premium_cruise
- contact_whatsapp · contact_telegram · get_site_context

Contact: WhatsApp +84364389764, Telegram @Nastasia8963, info@seatrips-nhatrang.com
